target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible collapse of structural elements; extensive brickwork loss; debris at base; roof and upper walls severely compromised; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, showing complete structural collapse, extensive brickwork loss, and debris at base. The scene depicts a single, large, multi-story brick industrial building in advanced decay, with missing roof sections, collapsed walls, and exposed internal structures, situated in a barren, overgrown landscape. The functional impact is complete loss of operational capability, consistent with the prior assessment of total destruction.
